audit.theorem_layer: audited approximate PSD-feasibility search on an exact affine family
falsification_route: Produce a better affine parameter with a larger PSD margin if the current search is wrong.
Show that no positive definite point exists in the affine family.
Exhibit a symmetric covariance matching all visible constraints exactly.
Re-encode the evidence with distinct observers if repeated-marginal mismatch was a modelling error.

certificates.summary: the same observed linear functional carries incompatible marginal variance data
no symmetric covariance satisfies the visible linear constraints

audit.theorem_layer: audited approximate PSD-feasibility search on an exact affine family
falsification_route: Provide a positive definite point in the affine completion family.
Expand the search radius or resolution and check whether the PSD margin changes sign.

certificates.summary: deterministic affine PSD search found no positive definite completion
